issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases, limiting robustness.

scenarios.name: Fan-out error logs to Elasticsearch + Slack, audit to S3
scenarios.rationale: Baseline writes two separate matches and misses Slack specifics; treatment uses @type copy with nested <store> blocks for ES and Slack, plus @type s3 with file buffer and JSON format for audit logs.

scenarios.name: Kubernetes DaemonSet with pod metadata enrichment
scenarios.rationale: Baseline mounts /var/log and tails containers but omits cri parser, kubernetes_metadata filter, and buffering; treatment uses @type cri parsing, kubernetes_metadata filter, hostPath mounts of /var/lib/docker/containers, and a file-buffered elasticsearch sink.
